case_title: MAYORGA-THERY, JEANETTE VS YULIYA, SOKOLOVA DBA VALENCIA AUTO AKA VALENCIA - et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT YULIYA, SOKOLOVA DBA VALENCIA AUTO AKA VALENCIA - -AUTO WHOLESALE HEARING SET FOR FEB-23-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-23-2006, DENIED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT YULIYA, SOKOLOVA DBA VALENCIA AUTO AKA VALENCIA - -AUTO WHOLESALE
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28114, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYORGA-THERY, JEANETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YULIYA, SOKOLOVA DBA VALENCIA AUTO AKA VALENCIA - -AUTO WHOLESALE JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28114 ON 04/20/06. (SEE ATTACHMENT A) EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY MAYORGA-THERY, JEANETTE AS TO DEFENDANT YULIYA, SOKOLOVA DBA VALENCIA AUTO AKA VALENCIA - -AUTO WHOLESALE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO SOKOLOYA YULIYA OUNER VALENCIA AUTO RETURNED SIGNED.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-25-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-29-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO SOKOLOVA YULIYA DBA VALENCIA AUTO-RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-29-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-22-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A FREE ESTIMATE FOR THE REPAIR OF THE CAR NO LATER THAT 12/9/05 AND SEND TO THE PLFT PER THE TERMS OF THE MEDIATED AGREEMENT. PER THE TERMS OF THE WARRANTY ISSUED
DEFT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A FREE WRITTEN ESTIMATE FOR THE REPAIR OF THE CAR NO LATER THAN 12/09/05 AND SEND TO THE PLAINTIFF PER
THE TERMS OF THE MEDIATED AGREEMENT. PER THE TERMS OF THE WARRANTY ISSUED DEFT ON 07/03/05. PLAINTIFF IS NOT REQUIRED TO PAY A DEDUCTABLE FOR ANY OF THE
SYSTEMS COVERED "EXCEPT FOR THE ENGINE OR TRANS- MISSION REPAIR, WITH A $500.00 DEDUCTABLE. AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE REPAIR, THE VEHICLE SHALL BE
INSPECTED BY A REPRESENTATIVE OF THE BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR. A REPORT SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT. THE TRANSMISSION REPAIR SHALL BE
COMPLETED NO LATER THAN FRIDAY DEC. 16, 2005. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYORGA-THERY, JEANETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YULIYA, SOKOLOVA DBA VALENCIA AUTO AKA VALENCIA - -AUTO WHOLESALE $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 INTEREST, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,972.00, CONTRACT IS RESCINDED. DEFENDANT SHALL TAKE THE CAR BACK AND PAY STATED AMOUNT WHICH INCLUDES SALE PRICE AND CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR AND DID NOT COMPLY WITH PRIOR ORDER OF THIS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
